---
title: Jaccard Similarity Heatmap RL
date: 2024-06-10
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

1. Create a heatmap of jaccard similarities between RL lineages of CCA and RPCA integrations.

## Files and directories

### Conda Env

Conda environment `/u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/scrnaseq_Leo/conda/scrnaseq_env.yaml`

### Input

CCA RL file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240524/25_pc_without_luo/25_pc_rl.qs`

RPCA RL file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240606/rpca_20_analysis/rl/rl.qs`

### Output

Output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240611`

## Process and Results

### Jacarddian Similarity

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r eval=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)
```

We will be using the ComplexHeatmaps package to create the heatmap
```{r eval=FALSE}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
```

Lets load in the UBC subsets
```{r eval=FALSE}
rl_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240524/25_pc_without_luo/25_pc_rl.qs")
rl_rpca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240606/rpca_20_analysis/rl/rl.qs")
```

We are focusing on the specific resolutions for each integration that we determined to differentiate the cell types
- 0.4 CCA
- 0.2 RPCA

Lets see how similar the clusters are
```{r eval=FALSE}
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240611"
source("/u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/scrnaseq_Leo/utilities/jaccard_matrix.R")

# CCA 0.4 vs RPCA 0.2
png(file.path(out_directory, "cca_0.4_rpca_0.2_jaccard_sim_heatmap.png"),width=15,height=15,units="in",res=600)
matrix <- jaccard_matrix(rl_cca, 0.4, rl_rpca, 0.2)

# Appending inferred cell type to cluster
cell_type_cca <- c("GCP", "GC", "UBC", "GC", "GC", "GCP", "GC or GCP", "GCP", "GC defined", "GC", "RL", "Oligodendrocytes/OPC", "Mice RL", "Endothelial", "Microglia", "Oligodendrocytes/OPC", "GC", "Unknown" )
cell_type_rpca <- c("GC", "GCP", "GCP", "UBC", "GC", "GC", "GC defined", "GCP", "Oligodendrocytes/OPC", "RL", "Endothelial", "Microglia", "Oligodendrocytes/OPC", "GCP", "Unknown")

new_row_names <- paste0(rownames(matrix), " ", "(", cell_type_cca, ")")
new_col_names <- paste0(colnames(matrix), " ", "(", cell_type_rpca, ")")

rownames(matrix) <- new_row_names
colnames(matrix) <- new_col_names

cca_counts <- as.vector(table(rl_cca$snn_res.0.4))
rpca_counts <- as.vector(table(rl_rpca$snn_res.0.2))

col_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(cell_count = anno_barplot(rpca_counts, add_numbers = TRUE),
                          height = unit(0.75, "in"))
row_ha = rowAnnotation(cell_count = anno_barplot(cca_counts, add_numbers = TRUE), 
                          width = unit(0.75, "in"))
Heatmap(matrix, name = "Jaccard Similarity", 
    width = unit(8, "in"), height = unit(8, "in"),
    row_names_side = "left", row_dend_side = "right", row_title_side = "right",
    row_title = "CCA 0.4", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "RPCA 0.2", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
      if(matrix[i, j] > 0.1)
            grid.text(sprintf("%.2f", matrix[i, j]), x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
      },
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(6, "in")
    ),
    top_annotation = col_ha, right_annotation = row_ha
  ) 
dev.off()
```

![0.4 CCA vs 0.2 RPCA](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240611/cca_0.4_rpca_0.2_jaccard_sim_heatmap.png)

```{r}
print(sessionInfo())  
```
